title: Cryptool picked up by Yahoo Finance, Business Insider and Investor Observer
content_html:
Cryptool was covered this week by Yahoo Finance, Business Insider Markets and Investor Observer.

The coverage is the start of a broader marketing push, with a run of AMA sessions on partner channels lined up over the coming weeks to introduce the platform to a wider audience.

If you run a crypto community that would benefit from a serious investment management platform, this is a good moment to share Cryptool. The ambassador programme is the most direct way to do that, and rewards anyone who brings new users in.
author: Cryptool
